title: Making changes to the register
body: " Land registration is complex, designed to protect legal and financial interests in property. There can be significant consequences for any error. Please consider seeking legal representation. Before making an application without legal representation, it is important to consider the benefits of using a conveyancer.   Guidance     Update your name There are a number of reasons you may want to update your name, including marriage, divorce or changing or affirming your gender. You can also find  a specific guide to changing your name after marriage.   Registering land and property for the first time You need to register land or property, if it is not already registered, when you buy or mortgage it. Please consider seeking legal representation.    Dealing with the estate of someone who’s died   Update property records when someone dies  When a property owner dies, you will need to change the title register to reflect the new ownership. This guidance explains the options available to you. Please consider seeking legal representation.   Signing a digital mortgage deed How to use our Sign your mortgage deed service     "
